source: docs/NEEDS_ENGINE_QUALITY_CHECK.md (primary for categories 6–7; prerequisites for all)

metrics.Prerequisites: age, duration, phasePlan, objective, workMode, skillLevel
Pass rate on blocking C1 ids
progression D > primary D per phase
union of splits covers session ages
valid ages, numeric override, unique labels
mean D Split2 > Split1 in Output/Capacity
coach runs both groups without rewrite
pass rate on blocking C5 ids
all Split 2 labeled `per_split` progressions; `split_label` matching Split 2 (11–14); session-wide counter.
Output block items; Split 2 progression variants; strict min threshold from golden JSON.
Capacity block items; Split 2 progression count.
Resilience block items; Split 2 progression count.
per-item primary `difficulty.overall`; Split 2 `audience_splits[].caps.maxOverall`; eligibility formula `cap > D + 1`; phase_key filter — **TBD** telemetry counter.
eligible item count per phase; assigned progression count; lane pool size per phase — **TBD** telemetry.
all progression variants' `split_label`; Split 2 label set from `audience_splits`.
paired primary and progression difficulties; split `difficulty_cap` or `audience_splits` caps; replay of `resolvePerSplitVariants` headroom branch.
primary `difficulty`; per-split caps; `classifyAgeFit` function; progression assignment rows.
items with progressions; `split_variant_warnings` at pick time (or replay `resolved.warnings`); `splitCandidateAcceptable` logic.
`phase_key` per block; `shouldRelaxSplitGate(phaseKey, minutes, focusTargets)` inputs; Sustained vs progression phase list.

metrics.Metric: No duplicate progression slug in phase
metrics.Prerequisites: progression `exercise_id` per phase; `coaching.exercise.slug`; per-phase unique slug check.
engine `phaseUsedProgressionIds` Set per phase at runtime — **TBD** export to constraint report or eval JSON.
items with progression and `scaled` variants; `split_variant_warnings` mentioning scaling required.
eligible-without-progression item list; lane-eligible pool size per phase — **TBD** telemetry.
progression pairs (primary name + progression name) per Split 2; coach reviewer; value rubric.
`blocks[]` phase order; progression `per_split` keyed to phase.
Split 1 vs Split 2 progression counts on `per_split`.
items lacking progressions; `constraint_report.phase_fill` pool_size and split_rejects; reject reason taxonomy — **TBD**.
progression exercise prescriptions with dose/scaling; coach regressability judgment.
builder send-to-builder diff vs prescribed progression ids — **TBD** telemetry; coach edit log.
C6-MOP-07 coverage rate; C6-MOP-03–05 phase minimum pass flags; phase-level `split_rejects/pool_size`; weighting formula.
primary and progression `exercise_id`; `coaching.exercise_tag` with `facet_type === 'pattern'`; shared facet_id comparator.
`coaching.exercise.movement_family` on primary and progression; case-insensitive equality when pattern match absent.
all progression pairs per phase; evaluator `sharesPatternOrFamily` or `progression_lane_*` check results.
`sameProgressionLane` replay inputs (tags, movement_family, phase_key); evaluator `sharesPatternOrFamily`; parity diff.
`progression_lane_match_method` stamped on progression variant at pick time — **Available** (`phaseAwarePrescription.js`).
shared pattern when primary has pattern facet — **Available** (`progression_lane_pattern_priority_rate`).
methodology filter at pick + evaluator check — **Available**.
progression `exercise_id`; `exercise_phase_profile` for item's phase with `role` in (`primary`, `secondary`).
primary exercise pattern tags OR `movement_family`; progression-bearing primaries list.
`progression_lane_unassigned_deep_pool` on `phase_fill` when pool ≥ 20 and zero progressions assigned with lane rejects — **Available**.
progression equipment ⊆ primary ∪ session use ∪ session prescribed equipment — **Available**.
same item split1 vs split2 prog D
restore breathing slugs when box avoided
pattern tags on primaries; repeat count
NL resolver log before pool build
avoid list + slug aliases; coach floor
